title: iria torta
intro: Iria torta is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The iria torta plant offers several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of iria torta are typically made by infusing the leaves or roots in water to create teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
